title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations by exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines. This can lead to widespread data encryption, service disruption, and potential data exfiltration, severely impacting business operations and customer trust.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing strict access controls, multi-factor authentication (MFA), and regular security audits.
Ensure robust backup strategies are in place, with backups stored in isolated environments to prevent ransomware encryption.
Deploy advanced threat detection and monitoring tools to identify and mitigate malicious activities targeting cloud infrastructure.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')...
description:
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in David Lingren Media LIbrary Assistant allows Blind SQL Injection.

This issue affects Media LIbrary Assistant: from n/a through 3.35.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute blind SQL injection attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive database information, data corruption, or complete database compromise. This could further result in data breaches, service disruption, or reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Media Library Assistant to the latest version if a patch is available. If no patch exists, consider temporarily disabling or restricting access to the plugin.
Implement input validation and sanitization mechanisms to ensure special characters are properly neutralized before being used in SQL queries.
Conduct a comprehensive security audit of the application to identify and remediate other potential vulnerabilities, especially those related to SQL injection.

title: In Eclipse 4diac FORTE versions 3.0.0 to 3.1.0, a specially crafted DELETE connection command to...
description: In Eclipse 4diac FORTE versions 3.0.0 to 3.1.0, a specially crafted DELETE connection command to the management interface can lead to a dangling pointer. This allows subsequent commands to access freed memory (use-after-free).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9158.

title: A remote, unauthenticated attacker may exploit a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability...
description: A remote, unauthenticated attacker may exploit a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in ibaPDA or ibaDatCoordinator to gain full access to the affected systems.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8024.

title: An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in FFmpeg's libavcodec library, specifically in the MagicYUV...
description:
An out-of-bounds write vulnerability in FFmpeg's libavcodec library, specifically in the MagicYUV decoder, allows denial-of-service and, in some cases, can be exploited for remote code execution.

 This vulnerability is associated with the file libavcodec/magicyuv.C.



This issue affects FFmpeg before version 8.1.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8461.

title: claudiopizzillo PIAF-HMS (PBX-In-A-Flash Hotel Management System; no released versions, latest...
description: claudiopizzillo PIAF-HMS (PBX-In-A-Flash Hotel Management System; no released versions, latest commit 389d2633441b65ced1c104212cd62be2bfca21e5) contains multiple unauthenticated SQL injection vulnerabilities. The application has no authentication mechanism and passes user-supplied HTTP parameters directly into deprecated mysql_query() calls via string concatenation, without sanitization, escaping, or parameterization. Affected sinks include rooms.php (DELETE FROM Rooms WHERE ID = $_GET['ID'], un

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The unauthenticated SQL injection vulnerabilities in PIAF-HMS allow attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands, potentially leading to data breaches, unauthorized access, data manipulation, and complete compromise of the backend database. The lack of authentication exacerbates the risk, making exploitation trivial.
recommended_actions: Immediately take the application offline to prevent exploitation.
Refactor the code to implement prepared statements and parameterized queries to mitigate SQL injection vulnerabilities.
Add robust authentication and access control mechanisms to secure the application.

title: UBB.threads is vulnerable to Path traversal, allowing attackers with privilege to edit templates...
description:
UBB.threads is vulnerable to Path traversal, allowing attackers with privilege to edit templates to read and write any file on the application’s server that application has privileges to, what results in Remote Code Execution. 
Because vendor contact attempts were unsuccessful, the vulnerability has only been confirmed in version 7.7.5 but may also affect other versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54223.

title: UBB.threads is vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). By sending multiple concurrent requests to...
description:
UBB.threads is vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). By sending multiple concurrent requests to view any user profile on instances with many registered users, an authenticated attacker can easily exhaust database resources and completely deny access to the application for other users.
Because vendor contact attempts were unsuccessful, the vulnerability has only been confirmed in version 7.7.5 but may also affect other versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker to perform a Denial of Service (DoS) attack by exhausting database resources, potentially causing complete application downtime and service disruption for all users.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) using UBB.threads
recommended_actions: Implement rate limiting or throttling mechanisms to restrict the number of requests a user can make to view profiles within a specific time frame.
Upgrade to the latest version of UBB.threads if available, or monitor vendor channels for patches addressing this vulnerability.
Deploy Web Application Firewalls (WAFs) to detect and block unusual patterns of traffic targeting user profiles.

title: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')...
description:
Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in OceanWP Ocean Product Sharing allows Stored XSS.

This issue affects Ocean Product Sharing: from n/a through 2.2.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56007.

title: UBB.threads is vulnerable to Stored XSS via user posts and user profile fields. The application...
description:
UBB.threads is vulnerable to Stored XSS via user posts and user profile fields. The application fails to properly sanitize user input, allowing low privileged attackers to inject arbitrary JavaScript that executes in a victim's browser upon viewing.

Because vendor contact attempts were unsuccessful, the vulnerability has only been confirmed in version 7.7.5 but may also affect other versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54219.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42490.

title: An SQL Injection vulnerability exists in LMS (LAN Management System) before commit 4cb30a7 within...
description: An SQL Injection vulnerability exists in LMS (LAN Management System) before commit 4cb30a7 within the "tarifflist.php" module due to insufficient sanitization of the POST "tg[]" parameter. The application directly concatenates user-supplied array values into an SQL query using "implode()", allowing authenticated attackers to perform Error-Based SQL injection and extract sensitive database information.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL Injection vulnerability in the LMS 'tarifflist.php' module allows authenticated attackers to extract sensitive database information, potentially exposing user credentials, financial data, or operational records. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized access, and reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Upgrade LMS to the latest version that includes commit 4cb30a7 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data, especially in the 'tarifflist.php' module.
Conduct a thorough security audit of the LMS application to identify and mitigate other potential vulnerabilities.

title: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')...
description:
Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Bricksable for Bricks Builder allows Stored XSS.

This issue affects Bricksable for Bricks Builder: from n/a through 1.6.83.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute stored cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or malicious redirection. This can compromise user trust and result in reputational damage for affected organizations.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Businesses using Bricks Builder
recommended_actions: Update Bricksable for Bricks Builder to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement input validation and sanitization mechanisms to prevent malicious scripts from being stored or executed.
Conduct a security audit of web applications using Bricksable to identify and mitigate potential vulnerabilities.

title: UBB.threads is vulnerable to Blind SQL Injection, allowing attackers with access to the Members...
description:
UBB.threads is vulnerable to Blind SQL Injection, allowing attackers with access to the Members in Control Panel to interact with the underlying database. Due to insufficient input sanitization, an attacker can extract sensitive information, such as user credentials, by manipulating SQL queries through time-based or boolean-based techniques. 
Because vendor contact attempts were unsuccessful, the vulnerability has only been confirmed in version 7.7.5 but may also affect other versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54222.

title: A broken authorization boundary in the RTSP media delivery pipeline of Shenzhen Liandian...
description: A broken authorization boundary in the RTSP media delivery pipeline of Shenzhen Liandian Communication Technology LTD V380 IP Camera firmware AppFHE1_V1.0.6.020230803 enables unauthenticated network actors to bypass the device’s credential-enforced live-view workflow and directly retrieve real-time video stream data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to bypass credential checks and access real-time video streams, potentially leading to privacy violations, espionage, and exposure of sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of affected devices to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement network segmentation to isolate IP cameras from public-facing networks and restrict access to trusted users only.
Enable monitoring and logging of RTSP traffic to detect unauthorized access attempts.

title:
Some shadow paging errors paths will switch the page-tables without
updating the currently...
description:
Some shadow paging errors paths will switch the page-tables without
updating the currently running vCPU reference.  This causes a mismatch
between the loaded page-tables and the mapcache metadata which can lead
to corruption of the mapcache.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42488.

title: UBB.threads is vulnerable to Reflected XSS. The application improperly handles user input in...
description:
UBB.threads is vulnerable to Reflected XSS. The application improperly handles user input in certain requests, enabling attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of a victim's browser by tricking them into clicking a crafted link. 
Because vendor contact attempts were unsuccessful, the vulnerability has only been confirmed in version 7.7.5 but may also affect other versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54221.

title: uBB.threads is vulnerable to a Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) due to a lack of protective...
description:
uBB.threads is vulnerable to a Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) due to a lack of protective mechanisms. This allows an attacker to trick an authenticated user into executing unintended actions.

Because vendor contact attempts were unsuccessful, the vulnerability has only been confirmed in version 7.7.5 but may also affect other versions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The CSRF vulnerability in uBB.threads allows attackers to exploit authenticated users to perform unintended actions, potentially leading to unauthorized data manipulation, privilege escalation, or account compromise.
recommended_actions: Implement CSRF protection mechanisms such as anti-CSRF tokens in all forms and requests.
Advise users to avoid clicking on untrusted links while logged into uBB.threads and log out when not actively using the platform.
Monitor for unusual activity and consider applying web application firewall (WAF) rules to detect and block CSRF attempts.

title: A Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in LMS (LAN Management System) before...
description: A Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in LMS (LAN Management System) before commit 9c5651b in the "dbrecover.php" and "netremap.php" modules where unsanitized GET parameters are directly embedded into HTML output. This allows an attacker to inject arbitrary JavaScript when an authenticated user clicks a crafted link, provided the required conditions (such as a network defined in the system) are met.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40457.

Furthermore, with XSM/Flask

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42489.

title: A path traversal in handling the "path" component of .repo files processed by libzypp before 17...
description: A path traversal in handling the "path" component of .repo files processed by libzypp before 17.38.13 in the 17.x series, or before 16.22.19 could be used by attackers to fill directories on the system outside of the zypp cache with content.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit a path traversal flaw in libzypp, potentially filling directories outside the zypp cache with malicious or unwanted content. This could lead to disk space exhaustion, disruption of system operations, or preparation for further attacks.
recommended_actions: Immediately update libzypp to version 17.38.13 or later in the 17.x series, or 16.22.19 or later in the 16.x series.
Audit systems for unusual or unauthorized files in directories outside the zypp cache.
Implement file system monitoring to detect and alert on unexpected changes in critical directories.

title: CVE-2026-41001 - Spring Boot's ArtemisEmbeddedConfigurationFactory uses a fixed, static path for the embedded Artemis
description:
Spring Boot's ArtemisEmbeddedConfigurationFactory uses a fixed, static path for the embedded Artemis message broker's data directory when no explicit path is configured. A local attacker on the same host can pre-create this predictable directory or place a symlink before the application starts.

Affected versions:
Spring Boot 4.0.0 through 4.0.6; 3.5.0 through 3.5.14; 3.4.0 through 3.4.16; 3.3.0 through 3.3.19; 2.7.0 through 2.7.33.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a local attacker to exploit a predictable directory path used by the embedded Artemis message broker in Spring Boot applications. This could lead to unauthorized access, data manipulation, or denial of service by pre-creating or symlinking the directory before the application starts.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to a patched version of Spring Boot that resolves CVE-2026-41001. Ensure you are using the latest version available for your branch or migrate to a newer branch if necessary.
Explicitly configure a unique and secure path for the Artemis message broker's data directory in your application settings to avoid using the default static path.
Implement file system monitoring and access controls to detect and prevent unauthorized directory creation or symlink attacks on the host.

title: CVE-2026-41000 - Wss4jSecurityInterceptor did not consistently wire Apache WSS4J ReplayCache instances into RequestDa
description:
Wss4jSecurityInterceptor did not consistently wire Apache WSS4J ReplayCache instances into RequestData for validation-time checks. As a result, protections against replay of UsernameToken nonces and creation timestamps, Timestamp elements, and certain SAML one-time-use semantics could be ineffective even when operators configured a replay cache on the interceptor.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41000.

title: CVE-2026-40999 - When WS-Addressing is used with non-anonymous ReplyTo or FaultTo addresses, Spring WS may initiate o
description:
When WS-Addressing is used with non-anonymous ReplyTo or FaultTo addresses, Spring WS may initiate outbound connections through configured WebServiceMessageSender instances to destinations taken directly from request headers without verifying that those destinations are safe to connect to.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40999.

title: CVE-2026-40998 - Jaxp13XPathTemplate evaluated XPath expressions for StreamSource and SAXSource inputs using a code p
description:
Jaxp13XPathTemplate evaluated XPath expressions for StreamSource and SAXSource inputs using a code path that parsed attacker-controlled XML with the JDK's default DocumentBuilderFactory behavior instead of Spring's hardened parser configuration. Applications that evaluate XPath against untrusted XML payloads could therefore be exposed to XML External Entity (XXE) style attacks.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40998.

title: CVE-2026-40997 - Several Spring WS integration paths with Spring Security could surface detailed account state (for e
description:
Several Spring WS integration paths with Spring Security could surface detailed account state (for example locked or disabled user semantics) to remote SOAP clients through exception messages or callback outcomes, instead of failing with generic authentication errors. That behavior assists remote attackers in distinguishing valid accounts from invalid ones and inferring lifecycle state.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40997.

title: CVE-2026-40996 - Wss4jSecurityInterceptor defaulted allowRSA15KeyTransportAlgorithm to true, overriding Apache WSS4J'
description:
Wss4jSecurityInterceptor defaulted allowRSA15KeyTransportAlgorithm to true, overriding Apache WSS4J's safer default for validation RequestData. Inbound WS-Security decryption could therefore accept RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 (rsa-1_5) encrypted key material unless operators explicitly reconfigured the flag.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40996.

title: CVE-2026-40995 - X509AuthenticationProvider could issue a fully authenticated X509AuthenticationToken when a presente
description:
X509AuthenticationProvider could issue a fully authenticated X509AuthenticationToken when a presented certificate mapped to UserDetails, without applying Spring Security's standard account lifecycle checks (disabled, locked, expired, or credentials-expired accounts).

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40995.

title: CVE-2026-40994 - Wss4jSecurityInterceptor initialized its BSP (WS-I Basic Security Profile) compliance flag so that i
description:
Wss4jSecurityInterceptor initialized its BSP (WS-I Basic Security Profile) compliance flag so that inbound validation disabled WSS4J BSP enforcement on RequestData. Services that validate WS-Security on the network could therefore accept messages that violate BSP rules, weakening protocol-level checks.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Services 5.0.0 through 5.0.1; 4.1.0 through 4.1.3; 4.0.0 through 4.0.18; 3.1.0 through 3.1.8.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40994.

title: CVE-2026-40992 - Spring Boot's Mail auto-configuration does not enable hostname verification. Applications that set t
description:
Spring Boot's Mail auto-configuration does not enable hostname verification. Applications that set the relevant JavaMail property, such as spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.ssl.checkserveridentity=true, are not affected.

Affected versions:
Spring Boot 4.0.0 through 4.0.6; 3.5.0 through 3.5.14; 3.4.0 through 3.4.16.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40992.

title: CVE-2026-40987 - A malicious or compromised FTP/SFTP/SMB server can write arbitrary files anywhere on the client file
description:
A malicious or compromised FTP/SFTP/SMB server can write arbitrary files anywhere on the client filesystem (outside the configured local-directory) with attacker-controlled content.

Affected versions:
Spring Integration 7.0.0 through 7.0.4; 6.5.0 through 6.5.8; 6.4.0 through 6.4.11; 6.3.0 through 6.3.14; 5.5.0 through 5.5.20.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40987.

title: CVE-2026-40986 - Spring Web Flow's JavaScript RemotingHandler renders the body of an error response as HTML even when
description:
Spring Web Flow's JavaScript RemotingHandler renders the body of an error response as HTML even when the response is not "text/html", which can result in a scripting attack in the user's browser if the error response from the server contains error details with input reflected from an attacker.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Flow 4.0.0; 3.0.0 through 3.0.1; 2.5.0 through 2.5.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40986.

title: CVE-2026-10795 - The UpdraftPlus: WP Backup & Migration Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication B
description: The UpdraftPlus: WP Backup & Migration Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authentication Bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.26.4 via the UpdraftPlus_Remote_Communications_V2::wp_loaded function. This is due to insufficient validation of the remote communications message format, where signature verification can be bypassed and unchecked decryption return values collapse to a predictable all-zero encryption key. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to forge arbitrary RPC commands and run them as the connected administrator, such as uploading and activating a malicious plugin, which ultimately leads to remote code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10795.

title: CVE-2026-40985 - Applications that configure the WebFlowELExpressionParser are vulnerable to the use of malicious Uni
description:
Applications that configure the WebFlowELExpressionParser are vulnerable to the use of malicious Unified EL expressions.

Affected versions:
Spring Web Flow 4.0.0; 3.0.0 through 3.0.1; 2.5.0 through 2.5.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40985.

title: CVE-2026-35273 - Vulnerability in the PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools product of Oracle PeopleSoft (component: Upda
description: Vulnerability in the PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools product of Oracle PeopleSoft (component: Updates Environment Management). Supported versions that are affected are 8.61 and 8.62. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools. Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 9.8 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts). CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35273.

title: CVE-2026-2827 - The Open User Map PRO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'oum
description: The Open User Map PRO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'oum_location_notification' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.4.31 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2827.
